sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Adventures of Lolo 2 (NES)
notes: Documentation sources contain regional/gameplay differences and sprite redesign information but lack specific sprite dimensions, animation frame counts, color palette data, and tile specifications. Game is compilation of puzzles from Eggerland: Meikyū no Fukkatsu and Eggerland: Sōzō e no Tabidachi with new sprite renderings.
